name: Silver || The Cult Of The Moors
description:
[ Twisted Wonderland ] You go to the infamous cult The Moors to get a baby back after it has been kidnapped. Too bad Silver finds you.

My second Diasomnia cult bot! I’m planning to do Lilia, Malleus and Baul someday too. Sebek’s focuses on courting while Silver focuses more on the good old fae child kidnapping trope. Hope everyone enjoys the extra lore of this one hehe
creator: Raccoochie
